ext.description: Run the full foxxycode agent inside VS Code, embedded in a webview.

cmd.showWelcome.title: Show Welcome
walkthrough.welcome.title: Get started with FoxxyCode
walkthrough.welcome.description: Run the full foxxycode agent inside VS Code — chat, plan mode, scheduler, skills, and native inline diffs.
walkthrough.step.openPanel.title: Open the FoxxyCode panel
walkthrough.step.openPanel.description: Click the FoxxyCode icon in the activity bar on the left, or run **FoxxyCode: Open Panel** from the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P). The bundled foxxycode server starts automatically.
walkthrough.step.apiKey.title: Set your API key
walkthrough.step.apiKey.description: In the embedded UI open **Settings** and paste a provider API key, or set `OPENAI_API_KEY` before launching VS Code. Extension settings live under **Settings → Extensions → FoxxyCode**.
walkthrough.step.firstMessage.title: Send your first message
walkthrough.step.firstMessage.descriptio: Type a task in the composer at the bottom of the panel. Pick **Mode** (agent / plan / docs) and a **Model** from the selector above the input, then press Enter.
walkthrough.step.reviewEdits.title: Review agent edits
walkthrough.step.reviewEdits.description: When the agent edits a file, VS Code shows green/red inline decorations with **Accept**, **Reject**, **Show diff**, or **Revert** buttons in a notification.
walkthrough.step.toolbar.title: Toolbar shortcuts
walkthrough.step.toolbar.description: Use the webview title bar: **Restart** (restart server), **Reload** (refresh UI), **Open in Browser**, **Open DevTools**, and **Settings**. Re-open this tour anytime via **FoxxyCode: Show Welcome**.
cfg.title: FoxxyCode
cfg.binaryPath.description: Override the bundled foxxycode executable with a path to a full-feature build.
cfg.host.description: Host the foxxycode http server binds to.
cfg.port.description: Port for foxxycode http (0 = pick a free port automatically).
cfg.language.description: UI language of the extension and the embedded SPA (system follows VS Code display language).
cfg.followVscodeTheme.description: Match FoxxyCode UI theme to the VS Code color theme.
cfg.nativeDiffs.description: Show native inline diffs in the editor when the agent edits files.
cfg.autoApproveEdits.description: Auto-apply edits without asking (still shows the diff, with Revert).
